text: ACBA Bank Classic Time Deposit. Currency: AMD, USD, EUR, RUR. Duration: 1 to 36 months (31 to 1098 days). Minimum amount: AMD 50,000 or equivalent in foreign currency. AMD interest rates: 1-3 months 4.6%, 3-6 months 5.5%, 6-12 months 8.0%, 12-24 months 9.0%, 24-36 months 9.5% (via acba digital, branch rates are 0.1% lower). USD interest rates: approximately 0.6% to 3.0% depending on term. EUR rates: approximately 0.35% to 1.5%. The deposit amount may be increased at any time during the term except the last 3 months. A credit line of up to 70% of deposit amount can be linked to a payment card. Interest is calculated daily and paid at end of term or monthly. Early withdrawal pays 1% annual interest for elapsed days. Required documents: ID and public service number.

ACBA Bank Accumulative Time Deposit. Currency: AMD, USD, EUR, RUR. Duration: 6 to 24 months (181 to 732 days). Minimum amount: AMD 10,000. Allows additional deposits throughout the term. A bonus is paid every 6 months: 0.13% for AMD, 0.03% for USD, 0.004% for EUR, 0.06% for RUR annually. Branch rates are 0.1% lower than acba digital rates. A credit line of up to 95% of deposit funds can be linked to a payment card. Example: 50,000 AMD deposit for 732 days with 10,000 AMD monthly additions results in 283,661 AMD at end of term. Early withdrawal pays 1% annual interest for elapsed days.

ACBA Bank Family Time Deposit. Currency: AMD, USD, EUR, RUR. Duration: 1 to 24 months (31 to 732 days). Minimum amount: AMD 50,000. Interest paid monthly. A quarterly bonus is paid at the end of the 3rd, 6th, and 9th months: 1.25% annually for AMD, 1.0% for USD and RUR, 0.5% for EUR. Branch rates are 0.1% lower than acba digital rates. A credit line of up to 95% of the deposit amount can be attached to a payment card. Free VISA Classic or MasterCard Standard card if deposit is at least 500,000 AMD; free VISA Gold or MasterCard Gold if deposit exceeds 7.5 million AMD. Example: 50,000 AMD for 732 days with 10,000 AMD monthly additions results in 284,023 AMD at end of term.

ACBA Bank Fast Consumer Loan up to 10,000,000 AMD. No collateral required. Available online via acba digital. Borrowers must be Armenian residents aged 21 to 63 with stable income. Loan term: up to 60 months. Annual interest rate: from 18%. Funds disbursed directly to card account. Application can be submitted online without visiting a branch.

ACBA Bank Consumer Loan Secured with Deposit. Borrow against your existing ACBA deposit while it continues earning interest. Loan amount: up to 90% of the deposit balance. Available in AMD, USD, and EUR. Loan term: up to the remaining deposit term. Benefit: your deposit continues accruing interest while the loan is active. The loan interest rate is the deposit rate plus a margin. Documents required: ID and public service number.

ACBA Bank Mortgage Loans for Real Estate Purchase. Available for apartments from constructors and secondary market. Programs include National Mortgage Company loans, affordable housing for young families, and construction in border settlements. Mortgage loans are among the lowest interest rate products. Apply online or at any ACBA Bank branch. Supporting government programs available for reduced rates.

ACBA Bank Head Office: 82-84 Arami Street, Yerevan 0002. Phone: +374 10 31 88 88 (24/7). Card service phone: +374 10 31 88 99 (24/7). Email: acba@acba.am. Working hours for all branches: Monday to Friday 09:30-17:30, cash register 09:30-16:30. Sebastia Branch: 80 Sebastia Street, Yerevan (Malatya-Sebastia district). Zeytun Branch: 13/5 D. Anhaght Street, Yerevan. Erebuni Branch: 23 Erebuni Street, Yerevan. Yerevan Mall Branch: Arshakunyac 34/3, number 93, Yerevan. Artashat Branch (Ararat): 31 Shahumyan Street, Artashat. Araks Branch: 45/1 Shahumyan Street, Ararat. Masis Branch: 3 Central Square, Masis. Martuni Branch: 52 Yerevanyan Street, Martuni. Sevan Branch: Nairyan Street 153/33, Sevan. Vardenis Branch: 5/1 Roman Street, Vardenis. Cash-in terminals available in all branches. ATMs operate 24/7.

ACBA Bank contact information. Head Office address: 82-84 Aram Street, Yerevan, Armenia. 24/7 Service Phone: +374 10 31 88 88. 24/7 Card Service Phone: +374 10 31 88 99. 24/7 American Express Card Service: +374 10 31 99 99. Email: acba@acba.am. Complaints and feedback: +374 10 31 88 78. Online banking available via acba digital at acbadigital.am. The bank is supervised by the Central Bank of Armenia.

Evocabank Classical Deposit. Currency: AMD, USD, EUR, RUB. Minimum amount: AMD 200,000 / USD 500 / EUR 500 / RUB 30,000. AMD interest rates up to 10.75% annually (paid at end of term). USD interest rates up to 5.75% annually. For monthly interest payment, AMD rate is 0.5% lower and USD/EUR/RUB rate is 0.25% lower. Deposit can be replenished — replenishment rate is 0.5% lower for AMD and 0.25% lower for USD/EUR/RUB. Total replenishments cannot exceed initial deposit amount. No replenishment allowed in last 3 months. Free payment card provided: Maestro for deposits up to AMD 5,000,000; MasterCard Standard or Visa Classic for AMD 5,000,001 to 25,000,000; MasterCard Gold or Visa Gold for AMD 25,000,001 to 50,000,000; Visa Infinite for deposits over AMD 50,000,001. Early withdrawal rate: 0.5% for AMD, 0.1% for USD. Deposit guaranteed by Armenia Deposit Guarantee Fund. Interest income subject to 10% tax.

Evocabank Evoca Online Deposit. Same rates as Classical deposit but placed fully online via EvocaTOUCH mobile app or EvocaONLINE — no branch visit needed. AMD rates up to 10.75% annually. USD rates up to 5.75% annually. Online deposits offer 0.25% higher rate than branch deposits. Replenishment available only through EvocaTOUCH or EvocaONLINE remote systems. No minimum replenishment limit for online deposits. Documents required: identity document and social security card (not required if identity card is provided). Loan or overdraft of up to 90% of deposit amount available, granted at deposit rate plus 2%.

Evocabank offers consumer loans, mortgage loans, car loans, overdrafts, and credit lines. Online loans available 24/7 via EvocaTOUCH app — approved within 5 minutes automatically. Consumer loans available with and without collateral. Property secured consumer loans: term up to 120 months for real estate collateral, up to 60 months for movable property. Mortgage loans available for real estate purchase from secondary market and from developers. National Mortgage Company program mortgage available at 12-13% annual rate for up to 20 years. Energy efficient mortgage available at 9.3% annual rate. Annual percentage rate on consumer loans starts from approximately 19.95%. Overdraft available online 24/7 with no paperwork via EvocaTOUCH. Gold secured loans available at branches within minutes, up to 95% of gold item estimated value. Student loans available for tuition fee coverage.

Evocabank Head Office: 44/2 Hanrapetutyan Street, Yerevan 0010, Armenia. Phone: +374 10 60 55 55 or +374 99 60 55 55. Email: info@evoca.am. The bank has 16 branches in Yerevan, Abovyan, Gyumri, and Vanadzor. Yerevan branches: 12 Azatutyun Avenue, 32/8 Tigran Petrosyan Street, 76 Gajegorcneri Street, 9/45 Garegin Nzhdeh Street, 5 Kasyan Street, 2 Kievyan Street, 134/8 Zoravar Andranik Street, 14/9 Gai Avenue, 15/3 Paronyan Street, 15 Tumanyan Street. Evocabank is Armenia's first digital bank operating in Mobile First format. All services available via EvocaTOUCH mobile app and EvocaONLINE internet banking 24/7. ATMs available nationwide. Established in 1990, renamed Evocabank in 2017. Twice recognized as best digital bank in Armenia by Global Finance magazine.

Ardshinbank offers time deposits and savings deposits in AMD, USD, EUR, and RUR. As of early 2026, AMD deposit rates at Ardshinbank reach up to 9.5-10% annually for longer terms, in line with the broader Armenian market. USD deposit rates range from approximately 3% to 4.5% annually. EUR deposit rates approximately 1.5-2% annually. Ardshinbank is Armenia's largest bank by assets (approximately AMD 1,500 billion, 17.7% of total banking sector assets). Deposits protected by Armenia's Deposit Guarantee Fund up to 16,000,000 AMD for AMD deposits and 7,000,000 AMD for foreign currency. Online deposit management available via ibanking Ardshinbank.

Ardshinbank offers consumer loans, mortgage loans, car loans, and credit lines. Ardshinbank demonstrates the lowest monthly financial burden among Armenian banks for consumer loans due to lower average effective rates and absence of fees. For a loan of AMD 10,000,000 over 5 years, monthly payment is approximately AMD 242,000. Effective annual rates on consumer loans start from approximately 16% in 2026. Mortgage loans available for real estate purchase, renovation, and construction. The bank specializes in project financing for large corporate customers in strategic industries and the energy sector. Online loan applications available via ibanking Ardshinbank. Customer service: +374 12 22 22 22 or +374 10 22 22 22.

Ardshinbank has 60 branches across Armenia, one of the largest branch networks in the country, plus a representative office in Paris, France. Head Office: Yerevan, Armenia. Phone: +374 12 22 22 22 or +374 10 22 22 22. Branches in Yerevan include: Garegin Nzhdehi Square, Tigran Metsi Ave 10 (Yerevan City), Tigran Metsi Ave 16 (Rossia Mall), Komitasi Ave 60/2 (Yerevan City), Arshakunyats Ave 34/3 (Yerevan Mall), Nor Nork 3rd Block Gai Ave 16 (Megamall Armenia), Rubinyants St 15/5 (Yerevan City), Daniel Varuzhani St 28 (Astghik medical center), Davit Anhaghti St 10, Davtashen 3rd District Tigran Petrosyan St 25/5. Branches also in Ashtarak, Hrazdan, Ijevan, Abovyan, and other cities across Armenia. ATMs available 24/7 nationwide. Online banking via ibanking.ardshinbank.am.
